title: Franchise Agreement (Traditional)

clauses.obligation: Adopt and use McDonald's System at Restaurant only. Own complete equity interest. Full-time best efforts and personal on-premises supervision.
Non-exclusive right to use McDonald's System at specific location for stated term (typically 20 years). Rights limited to Restaurant location only.
McDonald's advises/consults periodically. Communicates know-how, techniques, improvements via visits, reports, seminars, newsletters.

Franchisee must adopt exclusively all formulas, methods, policies in business manuals. Must keep manuals confidential. Cannot disclose to non-employees. Manuals incorporated by reference and subject to modification.
Use only McDonald's-approved materials. Spend min 4% of Gross Sales annually on advertising. OPNAD/cooperative contributions credited.
Enroll self and managers at Hamburger University or designated training centers. McDonald's bears training center costs; franchisee bears travel/living/compensation.
All revenues from all business at or from Restaurant. Excludes sales tax and returns/refunds. Credit sales treated as sale in month charged.
Pay monthly royalty by 10th of following month. Participate in auto-debit program. Interest on delinquencies at 15% (or max legal rate), monthly compounding.
clauses.money: Royalty percentage of Gross Sales (see Item 6)

clauses.obligation: Pay $45,000 initial franchise fee. Earned upon completion of construction. Refundable only if construction not completed within 1 year.

Monthly statements by 11am CT first business day. Operating statement and statistical report by 25th. Keep records 3 years. Annual P&L and balance sheet within 90 days of fiscal year end. McDonald's has audit right; franchisee pays cost if understatement >= 2%.

(a) During term: no direct/indirect interest in similar restaurant business. (b) Post-term: no similar business within 10 miles for 18 months. (c) No duplication of System. (d) No disclosure to non-employees. (e) No use of marks outside Restaurant. Exception: <2% ownership of publicly traded company.

Operate clean and wholesome per standards. Purchase per specs. Keep building/equipment per blueprints. No alterations without consent. Make repairs. Maintain parking. Operate 7 days/week min 7am-11pm (or as prescribed). Uniforms. Use only approved containers/ingredients/methods. Prompt payment of invoices. Comply with all laws.
Full-time best efforts to operation. Keep free from conflicting enterprises.

(a) Death/disability: assign to spouse/heirs/relatives if qualified; McDonald's may manage up to 12 months then purchase at FMV. (b) Corporate assignment with McDonald's approval. (c) First option to purchase: 20-day notice, 10-day exercise. (d) Other assignment: consent not arbitrarily withheld; criteria include experience, financial background, character, full-time commitment, locality, equity interest. Transferee assumes full liability; original franchisee remains liable for full term. Royalty auto-adjusts to current rate.
Franchisee is independent contractor, not agent. Responsible for all obligations, liabilities, losses, claims. Not partners or joint employers.

Workers comp as required by law + $100K/$500K/$100K employer's liability. Commercial general liability $5M per occurrence / $5M aggregate. All policies name McDonald's as additional insured. Evidence 30 days before opening and 30 days before expiration. A+ or A rating, category IX+ (Best). If franchisee fails, McDonald's may purchase and add to rent.

McDonald's may terminate upon: (a) failure to maintain standards; (b) bankruptcy/insolvency; (c) non-payment >30 days; (d) judgment >$5K for >30 days; (e) loss of possession; (f) competing interest; (g) System duplication; (h) System disclosure; (i) mark misuse; (j) unapproved food sale; (k) unauthorized transfer; (l) denied inspection; (m) repeated late payments; (n) misrepresentation; (o) reputation-damaging conduct (except legitimate political activity); (p) felony conviction; (q) intentional sales underreporting.

Non-Section-18 breaches do not individually justify termination (except repeated breaches). McDonald's may seek injunctive relief, damages, specific performance. Any uncured breach is grounds to withhold transfer consent.

(a) McDonald's may enter and take possession. (b) On breach termination: no removal of property for 30 days; McDonald's option to purchase FF&E at FMV; no payment for intangibles. (c) On term expiration: no removal within 60 days; McDonald's 30-day purchase option at FMV; no payment for intangibles. (d) Return manuals, cease use of System/marks, no similar marks thereafter.
No waiver of breach constitutes waiver of subsequent breach or terms.
Written, by personal service or certified/registered mail to Restaurant address or McDonald's at 110 N. Carpenter St, Chicago IL 60607.
If McDonald's institutes action, entitled to recover reasonable attorneys' fees, court costs, litigation expenses.

Franchisee indemnifies and holds McDonald's harmless against all judgments, settlements, penalties, expenses (including attorneys' fees) from claims arising from franchisee's acts/omissions, employee/agent acts, or Restaurant premises. At McDonald's election, franchisee must also defend.
clauses.trigger: Any claim arising from Restaurant operations

clauses.obligation: Invalid provisions severable. McDonald's reserves right to terminate if material provision stricken.
Entire agreement, supersedes all prior. Nothing disclaims FDD representations. No modification binding unless written, signed by officer or franchising director, identified as amendment.
Illinois law governs.

Franchisee acknowledges: (a) term with no renewal promise; (b) received and read Franchise; (c) no profitability representation; (d) worked at McDonald's restaurant and investigated; (e) no exclusive territory; (f) entire agreement but FDD not disclaimed; (g) McDonald's owns marks; (h) no future franchise promises; (i) no oral representations; (j) personal offer, non-transferable.

distinctive_clauses: No renewal right (Section 28(a)): explicitly acknowledged, no promise or representation
No territory (Section 28(e)): explicitly acknowledged, no exclusive, protected, or territorial rights
Political activity carve-out (Section 18(o)): legitimate political activity not grounds for reputation-based termination
Interest rate (Section 8(c)): 15% annual on past-due amounts, monthly compounding
Best efforts (Sections 1(e), 13): full-time, personal, on-premises, keep free from conflicting enterprises
No payment for intangibles on termination (Section 20): at breach or expiration
